PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Feb-03-2020 is admitted to probate. James Gin Wong, Joanne Schaeffer, and Michael Gina are appointed co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-19-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-16-2022 Continued To Aug-30-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
